allow: PowerShell(Set-Location D:\\chaalak-app; $job = Start-Job { Set-Location D:\\chaalak-app; npm run dev 2>&1 }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 12; Receive-Job $job; Stop-Job $job; Remove-Job $job)
PowerShell(3001..3010 | ForEach-Object { $port = $_; $result = netstat -ano | findstr ":$port "; if \($result\) { "$port IN USE" } else { "$port free" } })

PowerShell(Set-Location D:\\chaalak-app; node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); const deps = {...p.dependencies, ...p.devDependencies}; const expected = ['@supabase/supabase-js','@supabase/ssr','leaflet','react-leaflet','@types/leaflet','web-push','@types/web-push','zustand','react-hook-form','zod','@hookform/resolvers','date-fns','clsx','tailwind-merge','lucide-react','@radix-ui/react-dialog','@radix-ui/react-toast','framer-motion']; expected.forEach\(p => console.log\(deps[p] ? `OK  ${p}@${deps[p]}` : `MISSING  ${p}`\)\)")
